rationale: The proposed homestead exemption change under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.043, which governs application processes for student grants. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The agency shall establish an application process for an eligible student's parent to apply for a grant held in an online account maintained under Section 29.042(b) and assigned to the student under Section 29.045.
_note: No conflict; rule concerns education grant applications, not property tax exemptions.
